title: Non written fics
wikitext:
[]: Non-written fics             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Tue Feb 07, 2006 1:43 pm I was gonna' ask what fics pairing have been done, but instead I think an easier question would be; What fic pairings haven't been done?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Feb 07, 2006 1:47 pm Between RAndom1377 and RX7 over at Darkscribes.org they've all been done.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Feb 07, 2006 1:48 pm Sadly very few Keel fics have been written.... the only pairing I've ever seen with him is Keel/Kozo...we need more Keel fics people! How about Keel/Ritsuko? I've never seen a... Gendo/Hikari Gendo/Toji Ritsuko/Makoto Keel/Maya Keel/Shinji Shinji/Aoba

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 07, 2006 2:00 pm I can't say that I've looked exhaustively. I definitely haven't seen Kensuke paired off all that often, and certainly not with any of the adults (I think he gets paired more in pics than fics). My favourites - Asuka/Hikari, /Maya and /(boy-)Kaworu - have been done, but are as rare as hens' teeth. Of course this is without crossing the series barrier in crossover fics (like the wedge of unwritten ideas I have for anyone who's interested - http://www.stevegilham.com/nge/variations.html )

[]:             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Thu Feb 09, 2006 5:53 pm Easy. I haven't found ANY Evanglion relationship fics! I mean absolutely no Naked Eva love? What happened to the fans imagination! Seriously though, I haven't found any Rei/Kaoru fics. Do angels dream of love? No? Hey! You asked me!

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Fri Feb 10, 2006 10:29 am Wtf, you havent found Rei/Kaworu? I've found tons of it. I hate it. Get it out of my face. I WANT TO SEE OMGSHOOTME Kensuke/Asuka and omg throw Shinji in cus we love orgies.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 10, 2006 1:10 pm @Olin of Xephon Unfortunately Reichu's "Beyond Eva's Shores" is caught in eternal draft state. There is, of course, her sculpture of Santa Barb and Nao-chan, which arose from the scenario. Look for the "Naughty Evas" thread @Shnooks R/K is definitely a favourite for pics. As for Kensuke/Asuka - - she doesn't have a lot of choice, does she. I did pitch a scenario with this in on ANF last year in response to "What if EVA-04 was delivered OK?" - which had EVA-02 fall victim to Bardiel, and with her being invalided out, Asuka and Kensuke were thrown together while everything else happened.
summary:
[]: Non-written fics             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Tue Feb 07, 2006 1:43 pm I was gonna' ask what fics pairing have been done, but instead I think an easier question would be; What fic pairings haven't been done?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Feb 07, 2006 1:47 pm Between RAndom1377 and RX7 over at Darkscribes.org they've all been done.

[]: &nbs
